name: Jennifer and Nellie
description:
The Owner Duo Series, #4.

Demi-human User

10/13/24: Updated.

Jennifer is a woman who likes to save strays. She found Nellie, a catgirl, a few years ago and decided to keep her. Now she's found you, a demi-human in need of a home.

Image from Gemini

Previous in the series: Linda and Bruno (Dead Dove).

Next in the series: James and Dewey.
creator: KitKat73
